en_body:
Yesterday I dwelled upon the sky
Your dress white at the hem, I returned dreaming clouds
Today I dwell within the forest
Seeking a strange flower, almost forgetting the way home
Cloud-silk loosely weaves the threads of heaven
Your dress the color red, the sun aches in my heart
Tomorrow where shall I dwell
That my dream of your dress-color may follow you away?

A Wandering Sulk
